response.justification: Strong full-stack candidate with 15+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Recent role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript/Node.js full-stack work plus AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which aligns precisely with the AI agent development requirement. Solid background across the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB), containerization, and testing practices (TDD, CI/CD). Lacks explicit Nest.js and Kotlin experience, but the breadth of languages and demonstrated craftsmanship suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Direct AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience at current role
Deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB across multiple senior roles
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is dated (robotic arms work circa 2016-2018)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate stack preference outside the primary stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent / MCP experience at current role
Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin experience
